query:
ALTER TABLE users
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status ENUM('pending', 'active', 'rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS whatsappAccess BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS avatarUrl TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone VARCHAR(32);

-- Garantir que o owner seja admin e active automaticamente
UPDATE users SET role = 'admin', status = 'active', whatsappAccess = true WHERE role = 'admin';
